sections.label: Chorus
lines: A tul gemgam sing tung ah, khut le khe khet a thuakna,
Keimah bek hong it ma’n hi
Kei tang sihna hong thuak man , Suahtakna ka ngah thei pan,
hong suplawh zen maw! (sum zen maw!)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lungkhamna’n hong tuum laitak, Jesuh’n ka van hong puaksak,
Ka nuntakna sung phat den ning, lungdamin lasak den ning,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mawhna teng sawp siang zo a, a kha kasung hong teng ta,
Nisim ka kha tawh teci pang hi. (hong
Khualmi bang ka vakthap hang, ka inn nuam nai semsem tang,
Minthanna dimin ka mu ding hi.
